rows.requirement: Create Phase 5 detail document before implementation
evidence: Phase 5 detail document defines objective, source documents, scope lock, functional scope, non-scope, domain model, API contracts, UI surfaces, E2E scenarios, tests, fixtures, exit gate, risks, and decisions
Scope is frozen around scheduling and Gantt foundation over canonical Phase 4 tasks without resource leveling, KPI control, external scheduler adapters, or separate Gantt task entities
tests: npm test exit 0, 39 files and 220 tests passed
rows.cleanup: No runtime writes; documentation-only contract block

rows.requirement: Define finite closed implementation tasks for P5
evidence: Functional scope table defines P5-001 through P5-010 with owner/module, expected behavior, acceptance criteria, E2E references, verification, task non-scope, and done evidence
Phase 5 requirements matrix pre-creates every P5 row as blocked until implementation provides fresh command evidence
tests: npm run verify:matrix -- docs/status/phase5-requirements-matrix.json exit 1 because P5-001..P5-010 are intentionally blocked before implementation
npm test exit 0, 39 files and 220 tests passed

rows.requirement: Define mandatory E2E matrix and verifier contract for P5
evidence: E2E-040 through E2E-044 are mapped to Phase 5 roles, fixtures, test paths, expected results, and required assertion pattern
Verifier owns the exact required_e2e contract and ledger test_path contract for P5-001 through P5-010 so final phase exit cannot pass with deleted, prose-only, or arbitrary Phase 5 E2E references
